title: Final Risk Register
publication_boundary: Claims are limited to controls and evidence represented in repository documentation and sanitized evidence files.

risks.risk: Long-lived cloud credentials in CI/CD or operator workflows
risks.business_impact: Credential leakage could allow unauthorized cloud access, registry access, or infrastructure modification.
risks.treatment: Mitigated through GitHub Actions OIDC token exchange, short-lived IAM tokens, and repository secret scanning.

risks.risk: Insufficient cloud audit evidence for security-relevant actions
risks.business_impact: Weak auditability would reduce incident reconstruction, accountability, and compliance confidence.
risks.treatment: Mitigated through retained Audit Trails, evidence index discipline, and explicit cloud evidence gap tracking.
risks.status: Mitigated with retained residual monitoring requirement

risks.risk: Uncontrolled cloud resource creation and cost drift
risks.business_impact: Unexpected managed infrastructure could consume budget and leave exposed resources behind.
risks.treatment: Mitigated through short-lived cloud runs, Terraform destroy evidence, and post-destroy zero-resource verification.

risks.risk: Insecure workloads admitted into the cluster
risks.business_impact: Privileged, root, mutable-image, or weakly constrained workloads could increase cluster compromise impact.
risks.treatment: Mitigated through Kyverno admission policy enforcement and explicit deny/allow evidence on Managed Kubernetes.

risks.risk: Unvalidated image provenance and registry push path
risks.business_impact: Untrusted images could enter the runtime path without adequate identity, registry, or policy validation.
risks.treatment: Mitigated through OIDC-based registry push, SBOM generation, vulnerability scanning, and admission policy requiring Yandex Container Registry images.

risks.risk: Known vulnerabilities remain unmeasured across baseline and hardened artifacts
risks.business_impact: Unmeasured vulnerable dependencies or packages could persist without remediation evidence.
risks.treatment: Mitigated through SBOM, Trivy/Grype scanning, and measurable before/after vulnerability reduction.
risks.status: Mitigated with residual dependency lifecycle tracking

risks.risk: Sensitive artifacts accidentally committed to public repository
risks.business_impact: Public leakage of state, kubeconfig, keys, or tokens could compromise infrastructure or invalidate publication safety.
risks.treatment: Mitigated through sanitized evidence, private runtime storage, gitleaks scanning, and explicit forbidden-artifact checks.

risks.business_impact: Overstated claims would reduce credibility under technical review.
risks.treatment: Mitigated through evidence-bound claims, control matrix, risk register, and explicit publication boundaries.
